name: Xiapu Luo

work.note: The official PolyU staff page and the ranking page both place him at The Hong Kong Polytechnic University.

tracking.note: Enriched from the imported ranking-page seed using the official PolyU staff page.

sources.note: The ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a PolyU affiliation for the imported seed.

The official PolyU staff page says he received his B.S. and M.S. from Wuhan University, obtained his Ph.D. from The Hong Kong Polytechnic University under Prof. Rocky K.C. Chang, and then spent two years at Georgia Tech as a postdoctoral research fellow advised by Prof. Wenke Lee.

summary: PolyU professor. The official PolyU staff page says he received his B.S. and M.S. from Wuhan University, earned his Ph.D. from PolyU under Rocky K.C. Chang, and then spent two years at Georgia Tech as a postdoctoral research fellow advised by Wenke Lee.

undergraduate.note: The official PolyU staff page says he received his B.S. from Wuhan University.

masters.note: The official PolyU staff page says he received his M.S. from Wuhan University.

phd.note: The official PolyU staff page says he obtained his Ph.D. degree from The Hong Kong Polytechnic University under the supervision of Prof. Rocky K.C. Chang.

postdoc.note: The official PolyU staff page says he spent two years at Georgia Tech as a postdoctoral research fellow advised by Prof. Wenke Lee.

name: Xuxian Jiang

work.note: The ranking page does not provide a current work institution yet.

tracking.note: Tracked as Yajin Zhou's Ph.D. advisor.

sources.note: NC State News explicitly describes Yajin Zhou as Xuxian Jiang's Ph.D. student.

The Purdue article says he received his Ph.D. in Computer Science from Purdue in 2006 under Dongyan Xu, his M.S. in 2001 from Purdue, and his B.S. in Information Science and Technology in 1998 from Xi'an Jiaotong University.

summary: A Purdue alumni article says he earned his Ph.D. in Computer Science from Purdue in 2006 under Dongyan Xu, and NC State News directly corroborates Yajin Zhou as one of his Ph.D. students.

undergraduate.note: The Purdue alumni article says he received his B.S. in Information Science and Technology in 1998 from Xi'an Jiaotong University.

masters.note: The Purdue alumni article says he received his M.S. in Computer Science in 2001 from Purdue.

phd.note: The Purdue alumni article says he received his Ph.D. in Computer Science from Purdue in 2006 and that Dongyan Xu was his advisor.

postdoc.note: No explicit postdoctoral history has been found in the current scan.
